core_mechanism: exhaustive classification of a parametrized family of objects into inequivalence classes indexed by the isomorphism type and dimension of their admitted finite-dimensional symmetry (Lie) algebra, using the structure theory of low-dimensional Lie algebras to enumerate the possible symmetry structures
brief_reason: The abstract classifies a whole class of equations up to local change of variables by bounding and enumerating the dimensions (one- through five-dimensional) and structure of their maximal invariance Lie algebra, relying explicitly on the theory of abstract low-dimensional Lie algebras.
